name: Black Sapphire cookie
description: What could be more delectable than fresh, juicy gossip?! Well, rumor has it there is a Cookie who has made the art of spreading rumors his profession! From harmless nonsense to large-scale propaganda—this charming fellow has mastered it all. Armed with his treasured eye-shaped microphone—a gift from the Shadow Milk Cookie Shadow Milk Cookie, no less—Black Sapphire Cookie works tirelessly to spread his master's teachings around the world on the wings of rumor. Try not to fall for his artisanal falsehoods. Who knows: Black Sapphire Cookie might be on the other side of the screen right now!
creator: Kui6pukui
